memberdef.argsstring: (u32 I2CBaseAddress, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u8 Freerun, u8 ConfigSelect)
memberdef.name: SI_5344_SetFrequencyConfig

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 I2CBaseAddress, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u16 RegisterAddress, u8 Value)
memberdef.name: SI_5344_SetRegister

briefdescription.para: This function sets a register in the SI 5344.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This function puts the SI 5344 into power down.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This function displays a registerdump of the SI 5344 device.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This file contains Si5344 related functions.

para.preformatted:
